testcase.name: GameState > should initialize with LOADING state
GameState > should transition correctly between states
testcase.system-out: [GameState] Transition: LOADING -> MAIN_MENU {} [GameState] Transition: MAIN_MENU -> PLAYING {}

testcase.name: GameState > should dispatch an event on transition
Playwright CI reporting config > enables failure screenshots and report outputs for CI artifacts
Bot > does not run combat AI during FREEZE_TIME
Bot > does not shoot during spawn protection window even when attacking
Player & Weapon System Integration > should equip primary weapon on initialization
Player & Weapon System Integration > should reduce player health when takeDamage is called and emit events
Player & Weapon System Integration > should handle player death correctly
Player & Weapon System Integration > should allow player to fire hitscan weapons and deplete ammo
Player & Weapon System Integration > should auto-reload when out of ammo
Player & Weapon System Integration > should update player rotation based on mouse movement
CompetitiveFlow > opens buy during freeze and blocks purchases after LIVE begins
testcase.system-out: [RoundManager] Transition to FREEZE_TIME [RoundManager] Transition to LIVE [RoundManager] Transition to POST_ROUND

testcase.name: CompetitiveFlow > ends round when attackers are wiped before spike plant
testcase.system-out: [RoundManager] Transition to FREEZE_TIME [RoundManager] Transition to LIVE [Economy] +$300 (Enemy Killed). Total: $1100 Round 1 Over. Winner: DEFENDERS (ATTACKERS_ELIMINATED) [Economy] +$1400 (Round Loss Bonus). Total: $2500 [RoundManager] Transition to POST_ROUND

testcase.name: CompetitiveFlow > lets spike detonate when not defused in time
testcase.system-out: [RoundManager] Transition to FREEZE_TIME [RoundManager] Transition to LIVE Round 1 Over. Winner: ATTACKERS (SPIKE_DETONATED) [Economy] +$3000 (Round Win). Total: $3800 [RoundManager] Transition to POST_ROUND

testcase.name: CompetitiveFlow > rewards defenders for a successful defuse
testcase.system-out: [RoundManager] Transition to FREEZE_TIME [RoundManager] Transition to LIVE Round 1 Over. Winner: DEFENDERS (SPIKE_DEFUSED) [Economy] +$1400 (Round Loss Bonus). Total: $2200 [RoundManager] Transition to POST_ROUND

testcase.name: EconomyManager > should initialize with starting cash of 800
EconomyManager > should add cash and cap at maxCash
EconomyManager > should dispatch cashChanged event when cash is added
EconomyManager > should allow spending cash if sufficient funds exist
EconomyManager > should reject spending cash if insufficient funds exist
EconomyManager > should handle playerKilled event and award cash
testcase.system-out: [Economy] +$600 (Enemy Killed). Total: $1400 [Economy] +$200 (First Blood). Total: $1600 [Economy] +$100 (Headshot Bonus). Total: $1700

testcase.name: EconomyManager > should handle round win and reset loss streak
EconomyManager > should handle round loss and increment loss streak bonus
testcase.system-out: [Economy] +$1400 (Round Loss Bonus). Total: $2200 [Economy] +$1900 (Round Loss Bonus). Total: $4100 [Economy] +$2900 (Round Loss Bonus). Total: $2900

testcase.name: FeedbackSystem > should show hit marker and play headshot sound
FeedbackSystem > should play body hit sound
FeedbackSystem > should ignore wall hits for audio
FeedbackSystem > should track multi-kills and announce them
FeedbackSystem > should prune old multi-kills
FeedbackSystem > should append label to DOM when showLabel is called
FeedbackSystem > should trigger screen shake on headshot kill
FeedbackSystem > should show slide kill and airshot rewards
MatchManager > should initialize in COMPETITIVE mode
MatchManager > should set COMPETITIVE mode and reset economy/rounds
testcase.system-out: [MatchManager] Mode set to COMPETITIVE [RoundManager] Transition to FREEZE_TIME

testcase.name: MatchManager > should set DEATHMATCH mode, grant infinite cash, and start extremely long LIVE round
testcase.system-out: [MatchManager] Mode set to DEATHMATCH [RoundManager] Transition to LIVE

testcase.name: MatchManager > should set GUN_GAME mode and start extremely long LIVE round
testcase.system-out: [MatchManager] Mode set to GUN_GAME [RoundManager] Transition to LIVE

testcase.name: MatchManager > should log kills specifically for GUN_GAME logic
testcase.system-out: [MatchManager] Mode set to GUN_GAME [RoundManager] Transition to LIVE [MatchManager] Gun Game Kill detected

testcase.name: RoundManager > should initialize with correct default stats
RoundManager > should start a match at round 1
RoundManager > should transition to FREEZE_TIME when starting a round
RoundManager > should end a round and transition to POST_ROUND
testcase.system-out: Round 1 Over. Winner: ATTACKERS (ELIMINATION) [RoundManager] Transition to POST_ROUND

testcase.name: RoundManager > should prevent ending a round if already in POST_ROUND
RoundManager > should transition from FREEZE_TIME to LIVE upon timer expiration
RoundManager > should transition from LIVE to POST_ROUND upon timer expiration (Defenders Win)
testcase.system-out: Round 1 Over. Winner: DEFENDERS (TIME_EXPIRED) [RoundManager] Transition to POST_ROUND

testcase.name: RoundManager > should transition from POST_ROUND to next round upon timer expiration
Collision > should have a collider map
Collision > should register and unregister colliders
Collision > should perform raycasting (mocked)
KineticEngine > should initialize correctly
KineticEngine > should track grounding state and combo window
KineticEngine > should handle regular jump
KineticEngine > should increment b-hop chain if jumping immediately after landing
KineticEngine > should ignore jump if airborne for too long
KineticEngine > should apply friction when grounded and not moving
KineticEngine > should dispatch playerSpeedUpdate event
HUD Integration > should create necessary DOM elements on setup
HUD Integration > should update health text when player takes damage
HUD Integration > should update ammo text from active weapon
HUD Integration > should process hitMarker events and render UI crosshair feedback
WeaponData > should have all required weapon types
WeaponData > should have correct melee properties for KNIFE
WeaponData > should have valid fire rates for all ranged weapons
